feedback.text: id like to bring up censorship like for adult games in storefronts like steam, currently in germany you cannot buy such products and this extens to even normal action /horror games Such as Dying light a country should not be able to decide what media you consume and neither should you be required to verify your age trough id or other means (as a cautionary tale neither should payment processors such as paypal etc. be able to deny purchases unless they are illegal )
